version_description: I have included the intricacies of the different parts that the current chord charts do not show - and also how to play extra parts such as the lead vocal for the chorus. It is also tabbed so that it can be played without a capo (as the other charts state 'capo on fret 2'.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: Newly revised. Includes strumming patterns and improved chord placement.
